channel.title: laurensverspeek.nl — blog
channel.description: Occasional writing about code, blockchain and this website.

item.title: a window manager in a div
item.description: dragging, snapping and alt-tab for lvOS — the fake desktop hiding in my portfolio — with one pointermove listener and a z-index counter.

item.title: giving my fake OS its own route
item.description: lvOS was a fixed overlay with a dead scrollbar and no shareable URL. moving it to /desktop fixed both — and taught me where overlays quietly lie.

item.title: one Game of Life, four places
item.description: the hero, a full page, an ASCII terminal toy and a desktop window all run the same 30-line Conway engine. a small lesson in keeping the rules pure.

item.title: putting a playable snake game in a fake terminal
item.description: a game loop, a <pre> tag, and stealing the keyboard from vue — no canvas required.

item.title: rebuilding my portfolio after 4 years of "coming soon(ish)"
item.description: from an unfinished nuxt 2 page to a nuxt 4 site with a terminal, games and too many easter eggs.
